enabled.description:
Installs the experimental-channel Gateway API CRDs (includes
everything in the standard channel plus newer, less stable resource
kinds and fields).
enabled.title: enabled

keep.description:
When `true`, adds the `helm.sh/resource-policy: keep` annotation to
every CRD so `helm uninstall` (and rollbacks) won't delete them.
keep.title: keep

enabled.description:
Installs the standard-channel Gateway API CRDs. Enable exactly one of
`standard.enabled`/`experimental.enabled` -- enabling both or neither
fails the install with a clear error.
enabled.title: enabled
